pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around. there's no point to any of it, honestly. i wake up, i eat, i sleep... but the person i was actually living for is gone. it's just empty.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space cosmics or whatever and it just hit me... like, in a billion years or even much sooner, everything we do, every person ever, every single memory, is just gonna be gone. the heat death of the universe makes everything feel like such a pathetic joke. why even bother trying to exist if the end result is just absolute nothingness? it feels so pointless to keep dragging this around.

pool.baseline: The candles have all guttered out, leaving me in a darkness that feels more honest than the light ever was. He is gone, and with him, the very soul of this house. I look at the heavy velvet curtains and the cold marble, and I realize... there is nothing left for me in this waking world. I feel as though I am already a ghost, merely waiting for my body to catch up to the emptiness.
